name: Pex
author: David J. Bush & Marjorie Rice (2008) / AGP port
description: Hex played on Marjorie Rice's convex-pentagon tiling (type 11): a rhombus of 128 pentagons where half the interior cells have 7 neighbours and half have 5. Place stones to link your two opposite coloured edges. Trivalent tiling ⇒ no draws, exactly like Hex. Pie rule.
